race.comment: BONDI QUEEN (12) showed good early speed and raced on the pace when first-up after a spell last start before fading to finish fourth, beaten 3.5 lengths, over 1100m at Northam. Blinkers go on now and she remains down in the weights. Looks well placed here back to an easier race. DUST ASIDE (2) resumes from a spell of five months and ended last campaign with a 3.5L defeat at Ascot. Best form is strong for a race of this calibre though and he can put his best foot forward. ARCTIC SNOW (8) wasn't far off maiden success before a short break, finishing the campaign with a minor placing over 1400m at Pinjarra Scarpside. Good effort to kick off last prep when in the money at Pinjarra Scarpside over 1200m. One of the leading chances. FINADO (1) comes here off a break of ten weeks. Worth noting he filled a minor placing when returning from a spell last time in work over 1000m at Belmont Park. Keep safe. SEMPRE (3) won't be far away.
